subcodes.first_line: Some time ago mention of thee flowed from the Most Exalted Pen and was revealed, and now once again, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy gracious Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چندی قبل از قلم اعلی ذکرت جاری و نازل هذه مره اخری لتشکر ربک الکریم قد قرء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
